title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
